title: Aqua Forge
description: This is a data pack that will generate an ocean biomes only world.
body:
**Aqua Forge**

This is a data pack that will generate an ocean only world
It includes all the ocean biomes and normal generation of cave biomes, ocean floor and bellow terrain generation and any structure you would normally find in ocean biomes.

**Minecraft version** 
- 1.21.8
- 1.21.9 - 1.21.10
- 1.21.11

**Loot Tables**

Loot tables have been adjusted in chests to allow the collection of items that would be otherwise unobtainable

- chests/shipwreck_map - minus tresure map 
- chests/shipwreck_supply - add sweet berries 
- chests/spawn_bonus_chest - all new 
- chests/ruined_portal - add creaking heart, heart of the sea 
- chests/ancient_city - add frogspawn, cocoa beans 
- chests/underwater_ruin_big - minus tresure map, add pink petals 
- chests/underwater_ruin_small - minus tresure map, add bush

- entities/axolotl - add turtle scute, turtle egg

**Recipe**
grass_block - 2x2 wheat seed + dirt

**Set up**
1. 1.Download data pack. 
2. Open Minecraft. 
3. Click on "Single Player" then click on "Create New World". 
4. Game tab: Give world a name and set difficulty. 
5. World tab: keep world type default, Generate structures On, Bonus Chest On/Off (recommended On). 
6. More tab: Click "Data Packs" and drag Aqua Forge data pack into Available window then move data pack to selected window by pressing arrow button on data pack image. Then click done.
7. Click "Create New World" and enjoy the challenge.
